goods.bodyHtml:
Merch
Just seeing me on screen isn't enough, is it?
♡ ♡ ♡
I've put together an annual schedule of big events and must-make merch! Use it as a guide for when to buy 🤍 Your wallet may be empty, but your heart will be full — right?
Jyumyou Alliance Exclusive Merch
Limited time / No restocks or reruns
Join the ¥1,990+ membership plan to receive exclusive merch with no restocks or reruns!
Once you miss it, it's gone forever......🖤
Check "About Jyumyou Alliance" on the Membership page for details!
Debut Merch
From January 3rd~
Buy Now 🤍

This is a made-to-order item!
※ Cancellations are generally not accepted after purchase.

"Just As-Is Acrylic Stand"

A large 13cm × 13cm acrylic stand 🖤
Printed straight from a photo of me as I am!
Coming to visit your home~

"Hand-Drawn Mini Chibi Acrylic Stand"

A small 7cm × 7cm acrylic stand 🤍
Easy to place on a desk or shelf!
So we can always be together......

It's a special one because it's Asobu's hand-drawn illustration!


Watch the drawing process here ↓

Jyumyou:3000
From April 25th~ / Made-to-order
Buy Now 🤍

This is a made-to-order item!
※ Cancellations are generally not accepted after purchase.

"School Uniform As-Is Acrylic Stand"

A large 13cm acrylic stand 🤍 Printed straight from a photo of me in my school uniform! ꒰꒱(⑅︎ᐢ. ̫ .ᐢ ) < Can I come hang out after school?

"Zoom Zoom! Commute Acrylic Keychain"

A small 7cm acrylic keychain 🤍 Features spinning legs! ꒰꒱(⑅︎ᐢ • , •ᐢ )💭 < Whenever you glance at it, look back on memories from the stream
It's special because it's Asobu's hand-drawn art!

Watch the drawing process here ↓

Mita Can Badge Series
Made-to-order / Vol.1
Buy Now 🤍

This is a made-to-order item!
※ Cancellations are generally not accepted after purchase.

Vol. 1

A Face Squish (75mm)

A standard can badge! Extra large so Mita's face is super visible ꒰꒱(⑅︎ᐢ◦` ˘ ´◦ᐢ ) < hehe ※ Minor adjustments in progress!

B Chic Silhouette

A super stylish side profile silhouette (self-assessed) Glittery with sparkling lamé!

C Fluffy Tail

The surface is fuzzy fabric with a sponge inside, making it super soft and squishy! It uses an actual photo of my tail 🤍

꒰꒱(⑅︎ᐢ ͈ ᴗ̀ ̫ᴗ́ ͈ᐢ ) < More designs will be added in the future!

Voice Gacha　Aquarium Date🤍
streamart collab / 6 types total
Try the Gacha🤍

This is a voice sales collaboration with streamart!
I worked hard on recording and editing to make you happy🤍
All 6 types of digital medals come with a video, which you can play to hear the voice.
It's a gacha format, but the pity is 6 pulls. ※Please read to the end for details on the pity system.

Your Hallucination of Going on a First Date with Mitarai Asobu
Aquarium Date🤍

'A Pure Story You Spun on Your Own'
～I have no memory of this～

【 A 】Your hallucination of calling into the void alone

【 B 】Your hallucination of getting ready alone in your imagination

【S1】Your hallucination of drinking alone at the bus stop waiting area

【 C 】Your hallucination of fumbling around alone in front of the fish tank

【S2】Your hallucination of eating two desserts alone

【 D 】Your hallucination of waiting for the bus alone

Collect all of them and the story is complete!
If possible, collect all 6 and listen in this order!

A → B → S1 → C → S2 → D

🎁 Earn bonus rewards for every number of pulls

6 pulls

I'll send you a complete set later. Even if you have duplicates from the gacha, any voices you haven't pulled by June 1st will be compensated. They'll be sent out sequentially after June 1st, so please check your email.

20 pulls

Song cover medley request right!
Make a list of songs up to 15 minutes, and I'll sing them on a karaoke stream!

50 pulls

Stream request right!
Drinking stream, mystery hot pot, a specific game, a one-on-one stream with you — almost anything is fine!

Merch request right!
You can request what merch you want me to make next, like plushies, body pillows, mousepads, etc. Plus I'll give you one completed item as a gift!

You can pay by credit card, Bandlecard, V-Prepaid cards available at convenience stores, etc.
We recommend purchasing 750pt × 6 pulls worth of points.

Also, you can do one free gacha pull per day!
S1 and S2 are not available from free pulls, but A, B, C, and D can be obtained for free!
Give the free daily gacha on streamart a try!

Try the Free Gacha ➡

♡ ♡ ♡
